description: Routes crews, materials, staging, equipment, inspection, and protection paths through the project zone graph

zone_graph.description: Nodes are zones/levels; edges are access paths with capacity and time attributes

access_paths.description: Named corridors, stairwells, ramps, hoists with width, height, load capacity

crane_hoist.description: Crane/hoist positions, reach radii, swing exclusion arcs, scheduled windows

walkways.description: Protected pedestrian paths with separation requirements

adjacent_work.description: Active work zones nearby with noise, dust, vibration, fall-zone impacts

exclusion_zones.description: Hard-blocked areas: open penetrations, wet concrete, live electrical, quarantine

crew_path_map.description: Assigned entry/exit routes per crew per shift with time windows

staging_map.description: Material staging locations per zone with delivery schedules

congestion_warnings.description: Predicted pinch points where path capacity is exceeded

route_conflicts.description: Detected conflicts between simultaneous route assignments
